---
title: "DATA550 Midterm: Analysis of Covid Cases" ### Add code for parameter-dependent title here
authors: Sophia Choudhri, Ava Crawford, Emma Dunne, Liam Hanson, Bailey Hebermehl, Licza Lobo
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
# Add code display options
params:
  sex: all # default
  medical_unit: all # default
---

```{r setup-params}
# if(params$sex == "all"){
#   sex = 
# }
```

```{r, child-reports}
#| child:
#|   - "subproject_bailey/report.Rmd"
#|   - "subproject_ava/report.Rmd"
#|   - "subproject_emma/report.Rmd"
#|   - "subproject_licza/report.Rmd"
#|   - "subproject_sophia/report.Rmd"
```
